name: WMI Event Subscription Persistence
description: Detects creation of WMI event subscriptions used for persistence
query:
// Detect WMI event subscription creation
// Trigger on wmic or PowerShell creating WMI consumers
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(EventConsumer|EventFilter|FilterToConsumerBinding|__EventFilter|CommandLineEventConsumer|ActiveScriptEventConsumer)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
